name: USB mass storage block
description: Enforce kernel rules blocking USB storage drivers.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper usb mass storage block settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on USB mass storage block. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `usb_mass_storage=disabled` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "usb_mass_storage=disabled", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-PIO-02", "cost": "LOW", "estimated_time_hours": 4}
